enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ulaga Nayagane'?

The song celebrates the joy of dance and togetherness, encouraging listeners to embrace the moment before saying goodbye.

How does 'Ulaga Nayagane' fit into the plot of Dasavathaaram?

This song serves as a lively interlude that highlights the film's themes of unity and celebration amidst chaos.

Who is the singer of 'Ulaga Nayagane'?

The song is sung by Vinit Singh, known for his energetic vocal style.

Who composed the music for 'Ulaga Nayagane'?

The music for this track was composed by Himesh Reshammiya, adding a unique flavor to the song.

When was 'Ulaga Nayagane' released?

The song was released on June 13, 2008.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ulaga Nayagane, the vibrant energy of the song encapsulates the spirit of celebration and dance, making it a standout number in Dasavathaaram. The lyrics invite listeners to join in the festivities, emphasizing the joy of living in the moment. This lively track evokes feelings of happiness and togetherness, perfectly complementing the film's narrative. With its catchy beats and engaging melody, the song is sure to uplift anyone's mood.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ulaga Nayagane from Dasavathaaram is a vibrant celebration of life and dance, showcasing the unique collaboration between Vinit Singh's dynamic vocals and Himesh Reshammiya's infectious beats. This song invites everyone to join in the rhythm and revel in the joyous moments before parting ways. Experience the energy and excitement that makes this track a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: Come Dance With Me Before You Go
In this world, who can surpass you? The pride of the nation lies in having you.
World leader, world leader, visions will awaken upon seeing you, and will call you in the future.
In this world, who can surpass you? The pride of the nation lies in having you.
World leader, world leader, visions will awaken upon seeing you, and will call you in the future.
Come Dance With Me Before You Go
You are a great artist, a constant genius, a secret poet with rich flavors.
With one life, you have taken a thousand births in this world, and in your life, you have seen a thousand separations.
Even if you are surrounded by troubles, they are not a challenge for you.
Even if you come first, there is no shortage of oxygen; if you say it, there is no Oscar award.
In this world, who can surpass you? The pride of the nation lies in having you.
World leader, world leader, visions will awaken upon seeing you, and will call you in the future.
Come Dance With Me Before You Go
A person with a body is one incarnation, but in the account of the mind, there are a hundred incarnations.
By understanding faces and reading minds, you have gained knowledge and become a scientist.
In the midst of the waves, the worlds sleep within your embrace.
Lying in the fire, you have become the one who has seen your state; now you have become a definition.
In this world, who can surpass you? The pride of the nation lies in having you.
World leader, world leader, visions will awaken upon seeing you, and will call you in the future.
World leader (4)
Come Dance With Me Before You Go
